clause: The Licensee shall pay monthly license fees on or before the 5th day of each month and delay beyond 7 days shall attract penalty.
base_output: The tenant must pay monthly fee on or before May 5th and delay beyond that date.
finetuned_output: The Tenante must pay monthly license fee on or before 5th Day of Each Month and delay beyond seven days shall attract penalties.

clause: Either party may terminate this leave and license agreement by giving 30 days written notice.
base_output: The tenant must give the landlord 30 business days written notice of termination.
finetuned_output: Either party can end this leave and licence agreement by giving three months written notice.

clause: The Lessee shall bear maintenance charges, electricity charges, and municipal dues during the term of tenancy.
base_output: The tenant is responsible for paying these costs.
finetuned_output: The Tenant must pay monthly electricity bills and other expenses while staying on property.

clause: The Lessor may forfeit part of the security deposit towards unpaid rent, damages, or other liabilities at vacating.
base_output: The Tenant may forfeit any portion of their security deposit if they fail to pay rent on time.
finetuned_output: The Tenant can claim any amount of security deposit against the landlord if it is paid on time.

clause: The Tenant shall not sublet, assign, or part with possession of the premises without prior written consent of the Landlord.
base_output: The Tenant must not rent out their property without the landlord's permission.
finetuned_output: The Tenant must not sublet or assign possession of the Home without prior written permission from the Landlord before starting any new lease.

clause: Police verification of the Licensee shall be completed by the Licensor and parties shall cooperate for documentation.
base_output: The Licensing Agreement will include police verification to ensure the tenant is compliant with the terms of the agreement.
finetuned_output: The Police Verification will be done by the Licenceee and the Party agrees to provide all necessary documents before proceeding with the police verification.

clause: A lock-in period of eleven months shall apply and early termination may require payment of remaining months' rent.
base_output: The lease agreement specifies the length of time a tenant must stay in the property before being locked out.
finetuned_output: A lock on 11 months will result in late payments and potential eviction.

clause: The agreement shall be registered and applicable stamp duty and registration charges shall be paid as mutually agreed.
base_output: The lease will be registered and the tax and fees will be paid separately.
finetuned_output: The agreement will be registered and tax stamps must be paid as mutual agreed.
